__comment: SKYBLOCK FIX: water is trivially infinite as a placed source, but not autocraftable as a bucket for machines. Ice bottoms out at snowballs, which are not renewable in the void, so that path dead-ends. This wrings a ring of leaves (renewable from any tree) into a full bucket - a plain crafting recipe AE2 can autocraft. Pairs with the lava recipe so both fluids feed the ME system.
